drivers.notes: 2.5-way topology — top driver covers mid-bass, lower pair rolls off lower

description.en: Flagship 2.5-way tower in Polk's Signature Elite line — 25 mm Terylene dome tweeter and three 165 mm Dynamic Balance mica-reinforced polypropylene cones, in a critically-braced cabinet with down-firing Power Port. The 2.5-way crossover at 2.4 kHz lets the top driver carry mid-bass while the lower pair rolls off into the 32 Hz lower limit; 90 dB sensitivity and 50–300 W amp window suit larger rooms.
description.es: Torre tope 2.5-way de la línea Signature Elite de Polk — tweeter Terylene de domo de 25 mm y tres conos Dynamic Balance reforzados con mica y polipropileno de 165 mm, en un cabinet críticamente reforzado con Power Port descendente. El crossover 2.5-way a 2.4 kHz deja al driver superior llevar el mid-bass mientras el par inferior rola hacia los 32 Hz; 90 dB de sensibilidad y ventana 50–300 W para salas grandes.
